title: Crispy Savory Slovakian Vegetable Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly and crispy savory dish featuring vegetables in a flavorful sauce with the addition of sake to enhance its depth of flavor.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the peanut oil over medium-high heat.
Add the onions, garlic, carrots, and celery. Stir-fry for about 5 minutes until the vegetables start to soften but still have some crunch.
Pour in the soy sauce and sake, stirring well to combine.
Increase the heat to high, bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and let it simmer for about 10 minutes or until the liquid is reduced slightly, allowing flavors to meld together.
Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper. Stir occasionally to prevent sticking.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
